extract: Aerial Ace (Japanese: つばめがえし Swallow Return) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM40 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon as well as in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM027 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM022 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
